passes.benefits_text: 66 Long Wharf Boston, MA 02110 617-227-4321 Get Directions Visit museum website for more information. This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. This is a two for one pass to the Boston Harbor Islands and is good for up to four people. It is not good for Sunset Cruises. Reservations Recommended by calling Boston Harbor Cruises at 617-227-4321. Specify which island you plan to visit, your date of travel, and your departure and return times based on the ferry schedule. On the day of your trip, go to the Boston Harbor Cruises Ferry Center at Long Wharf in Boston or at Pemberton Point in Hull, MA. Pick up your tickets at the Will-Call window at least 15 minutes prior to your scheduled ferry departure. Present the Boston Harbor Islands Library Pass to receive your free ticket with purchase of one Harbor Islands ferry ticket. Check Dates Harvard Museum of Natural History Learn More

26 Oxford Street Cambridge, MA 02138 617-495-3045 Get Directions Visit museum website for more information. This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. $6.00 Admission fee per person for up to four people. This pass also includes admission to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology. The two museums connect on the third floor and visitors may move freely from one to the other - all for one admission price. Check Dates Heritage Museums & Gardens Learn More
